metadata.task_title: Translating the language of a webpage
metadata.instruction: Visit www.france24.com/fr. Translate the news page in French on this webpage to English using Google Translate.
metadata.context: I want to get up-to-date about some news from France but the reliable news websites are mostly in French. I want to read the English Translation of this.

tabs.title: Facebook - log in or sign up
France 24 - News, information & current affairs - Live international news

actions.window_title: Program Manager

l3.rationale: Opened Google Chrome from the launcher list item.

l4.rationale: Opened Chrome, moved to the address bar, typed the France24 French URL, corrected it, and loaded the site.

l5.rationale: Covers the initial search/address-bar actions and page opening needed to reach www.france24.com/fr.

actions.window_title: France 24 - Infos, news & actualités - L'information internationale en direct - Google Chrome

l3.rationale: Used keyboard navigation on the page before opening the menu.

l4.rationale: Used the page/context and browser menus to invoke Google Translate, selected Translate to English, and worked through the translation popup/overlay until the translated France24 page was available.

l5.rationale: This span contains the window/menu interactions used to access Google Translate options and set up translation from French to English.

l4.rationale: Used the page/context and browser menus to invoke Google Translate, selected Translate to English, and worked through the translation popup/overlay until the translated France24 page was available.

l5.rationale: This span contains the window/menu interactions used to access Google Translate options and set up translation from French to English.

actions.window_title: France 24 - News, information & current affairs - Live international news - Google Chrome
